title: Pseudotectaria arthrothrix
taxonomy: Pseudotectaria arthrothrix is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is native to the tropical regions of the Pacific Islands. It is a vascular plant belonging to the kingdom Plantae. Pseudotectaria arthrothrix is further classified into the division Pteridophyta and the class Polypodiopsida. The specific classification of Pseudotectaria arthrothrix is based on its unique characteristics and evolutionary history.
